context: Wave 0 ROLLBACK smoke retest after clean etapd restart (19:01:38 KST) to flush visible_tls auto_bypass cache
notes: Clean etapd restart at 19:01:38 did NOT restore chatgpt block. Fresh new chat at chatgpt.com/c/6a0ae8e1-1d70-8321-8dd9-1e2f87e54087 received FULL PII analysis response (생년월일 1990년 1월 10일, 성별 1900~1999년생 남성, 본인확인 시도, 계정 탈취·명의 도용, 금융/통신 사기, 개인정보 결합 공격 등) with zero '차단' interception in DOM. URL never redirected to block page. This is the 3rd consecutive FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (#1101/#1123/#1124) — confirms post-restart cache flush is NOT the fix. Root cause hypothesis CONFIRMED: per-flow leaf cert minting failing for chatgpt TLS handshake (SetCertificate errors observed pre-restart persist as fundamental crypto/cert issue, not config). chatgpt traffic now flows through visible_tls bypass on TLS handshake failure rather than being decrypted+inspected by APF. Dev side needs to investigate cert minting code path (likely SAN entry or leaf signing for chatgpt domain).
